name: Fore INDR GLF - Point
address: 3296 Church St Suite D, Stevens Point, WI 54481
about: Fore INDR GLF is an indoor golf facility with two locations in Central Wisconsin, Stevens Point and Wisconsin Rapids. The venue features four world-class golf simulators powered by TrackMan technology, allowing players to play on top-ranked courses worldwide or practice on a virtual driving range. It operates as a year-round golf destination that combines golf with a bar atmosphere, offering league play with two-player teams and online bay reservations for up to six people per hour. The facility emphasizes a balance of golf, beverages, and camaraderie, making it suitable for both casual players and those looking to practice seriously.
why_golfers_like_it: Four TrackMan-powered simulators for realistic play and practice
15-foot wide hitting bays for a free swinging feeling
Online reservation system for convenient booking
Year-round access with two locations in Central Wisconsin
Golf leagues and social atmosphere for a fun experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available with food service
Full bar service with cold beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Four world-class simulators with radar technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own clubs to use in the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned, but the venue offers a full bar and kitchen service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes varies depending on the number of players and pace of play, but it typically takes 1-2 hours for a standard round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention kid-friendly amenities or activities, so it is more geared toward adults and serious golfers.
